production_approval.reason: Fresh relaxed-gate ANET+CRWD debit-spread selector from runs/portfolio-weekly-selector-research-20260701T115534.762220000Z is a full_promotion_candidate under the 26 trades/year ranking cadence and 7.5% canary capital-DD cap: 2274 trades, 119081 PnL, 62231 $25-cost PnL, 1.80 profit factor, 5.59% capital DD on the 100k research budget, 47.5% max symbol PnL share from TSLA, 18 symbol-ablation passes, and 1 strategy-ablation pass. The expanded semis/AI-infra basket was rejected because deployable spread-only alternatives underperformed this baseline and higher-PnL variants failed annual stability, capital-DD, inventory, or live-equivalence checks. Production remains limited to broker-reconciled Tradier put/call debit-spread entry and close lifecycle gates with account-sized budget controls.
